description_long: This shotgun features a robust, full wooden stock with a reddish-brown finish and a metallic receiver and barrel assembly. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a matte black appearance and several blue bands or markings along its length. A prominent pump mechanism is visible beneath the barrel, also marked with blue bands, indicating a pump-action design. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a visible trigger. The overall construction combines wood and metal, with the wood stock and fore-end contrasting against the dark metal components. The shotgun appears well-maintained, with a utilitarian design suitable for urban environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a full wooden stock, black metal barrel, and blue accent bands, featuring a rounded trigger guard and robust construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, metallic barrel, pump mechanism, and blue accent bands.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the cylindrical barrel, blue bands, and the alignment of the pump beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the length of the barrel, the wooden stock, and the pump mechanism with blue markings.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the trigger guard, pump, and the underside of the stock and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with blue accent bands and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
